title: Credit Risk Model Governance Console
summary: Track model experiments, approvals, drift, and release decisions for credit risk and lending models under governance controls.
knowledge_base: User: model risk governance teams overseeing lending models.
Primary pain: experiment data exists, but governance decisions still happen through scattered spreadsheets and meetings.
Decision output: approve, hold, or challenge a risk model release.
Business impact: lower release risk and faster regulated decision cycles.

app_modules.label: Gov 01
app_modules.title: Release Readiness Score
app_modules.description: Score a credit model release for governance readiness before deployment.

app_modules.label: Gov 02
app_modules.title: Drift and Approval Review
app_modules.description: Compare today's challenger package with the last approved release.

app_modules.label: Gov 03
app_modules.title: Committee Memo
app_modules.description: Draft the governance committee note for the lending model release.
